Petition For Order Confirming That Certain Asset Is Trust Property
Off Calendar Jan-20-2012 Denied
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Amy Shelf for Albert Bernzweig (Petitioner/Successor Sole Trustee).

Counsel provided a copy of the drafting Attorney's declaration which was filed this morning and presented oral argument to support her position. The matter was taken under submission.
